query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_claims, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN damagePhotos IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_photos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN damagePhotos IS NOT NULL AND JSON_LENGTH(damagePhotos) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as claims_with_valid_photos
FROM claims;
